youtube_items.title: [YT] The top 10 geopolitical developments for 2026
youtube_items.summary: Hi everybody and a really warm welcome. Today we're delighted to share the launch of our 2026 Geostrategic Outlook. Now we've been publishing these geostrategic outlooks for nearly eight years now. In each of those eight years, we've identified the top 10 issues that we believe are impacting the global business community, but also policymakers and government entities throughout the world. And so in 2026, we do the same thing. We identify our top 10 development that we think those individuals and those organizations should be focusing on. We're going to do one thing slightly differently this year, though. As well as hearing about those top 10 issues, we're going to move around the globe and hear from four of my colleagues in the Geostrategic Business Group for their take on what all of this

youtube_items.title: [YT] UN Chief on 2026 priorities | United Nations
youtube_items.summary: Good afternoon. Afternoon. Yes. All right. Good uh good afternoon. Welcome  uh to all of you. Just as a reminder,   we have our wonderful interpreters here for  French and Spanish. Um the secretary general   will make some opening remarks and he may take a  few questions from you. Dear members of the press,   happy new year. This is an especially meaningful  moment for me since it is my final opportunity   for our customary exchange at the beginning  of the year. So these are early days, but 2026   is already shaping up to be a year of constant  surprises and chaos. Before I entered public life,   I trained as a physicist. And in times of profound  flux, I returned to some of the fixed principles

youtube_items.title: [YT] The Biggest Global Risks for 2026 | TED Explains the World with Ian Bremmer
youtube_items.summary: Helen Walters: Hello everyone. Happy 2026, wherever you are. I am Helen Walters, I'm the head of media and curation at TED. It is January 5. I am in Brooklyn, I have a cold, so apologies if my voice gives out, but luckily, most of the talking today will be done by the one and only Ian Bremmer, the president of Eurasia Group, who often comes to explain what on Earth is going on in the world to us. He's also here today to share the list of global risks that he and Eurasia just published. So, Ian, thank you so much for being here. Ian Bremmer: Helen, happy New year. How else could one possibly celebrate but to talk about the global risk environment? HW: You really are a massive downer, it turns out. But it turns out there is also a lot to talk about. And so a lot of the report, which is so me

raw_items.title: Daily Press Briefing by the Office of the Spokesperson for the Secretary-General
raw_items.summary: Today is the International Day for the Elimination of Sexual Violence in Conflict. Sexual violence against children is one of the six grave violations against children identified and condemned by the Security Council. Ending this abomination, the Secretary-General says, requires protection, accountability and prevention.

raw_items.summary: Following is the text of UN Secretary-General António Guterres’ video message to the informal high-level discussion on the occasion of the twentieth anniversary of the Human Rights Council, in Geneva today:

raw_items.title: Meeting of States Parties to United Nations Convention on Law of Sea, United Nations Headquarters, 15-18 June
raw_items.summary: The thirty-sixth Meeting of States Parties to the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea was held at Headquarters from 15 to 18 June.

raw_items.title: Despite Ceasefire Gains, Gazans Trapped in Humanitarian Nightmare, Briefers Warn, as Security Council Speakers Demand Unhindered Aid Access, Respect for Peace Plan
raw_items.summary: While a limited ceasefire has improved life in Gaza somewhat, millions of its residents still face tremendous daily difficulties, the Security Council heard today, as speakers underscored the need to provide immediate humanitarian help to a population that can ill afford to wait.

raw_items.summary: The government can execute war criminals or get full international support—but not both.

raw_items.title: Israel and Hezbollah continue strikes despite ceasefire agreement
raw_items.summary: Several people are reported killed in southern Lebanon, with the IDF saying it hit "Hezbollah terrorist targets" after the group fired over 50 projectiles at Israeli forces.
